sections.label: Pallavi
sections.ta:
அணிகலன்கள் எதற்கு அபரிமிதமான வாழ்வெதற்கு
மணிகண்டன் தரிசனம் ஒன்றே ஜன்ம சாபல்யம் அன்றோ
sections.translit:
aNikalangaL edhaRku abarimidhamAna vAzhvedhaRku
maNikaNtan dharisanam ondRE janma chabalyam andRO
sections.en: What is the need for ornaments or luxuries in life? Is it not true that a mere sighting of Manikantan (Ayyappan) is sufficient for fulfillment in this earthly life?

sections.label: Anupallavi
sections.ta:
பதினெட்டு படி கடந்து பரமனை பார்த்தவர்க்கு
அதிசுந்தரன் அழகினை பருகிய பக்தர்க்கு
sections.translit:
padhinettu padi kadandhu paramanai pArtthavarkku
adhisundharan azhaginai parugiya bhaktharkku
sections.en: For one who climbed all eighteen divine steps and caught a glimpse of the Lord, and the devotee who literally drank in the beauty of the handsome Lord with their eyes, is it not sufficient for fulfillment in this earthly life?

sections.label: Charanam
sections.ta:
வாழ்க்கை பொதி யாவும் ஒருமுறை சுமந்ததுபோல்
தலையிடை இருமுடி ஏந்தி கானிடை நடந்த காலத்தே
கல்லும் முள்ளும் இடைவரும் இடரான காலத்தே
மகர தீபத்தே மாரகோடி ரூபத்தை விழியால் உண்டவர்க்கு
sections.translit:
vAzhkkai podhi yAvum orumuRai sumandhadhupOl
thalaiyidai irumudi Endhi kAnidai nadandha kAlatthE
kallum muLLum idaivarum idarAna kAlatthE
magara dhIbatthE mArakOdi rUpatthai vizhiyAl uNdavarkku
sections.en: A staunch devotee carried two interlocked bags holding devotional and personal articles, the weight reminiscent of his entire life’s baggage carried with him. He walked the pilgrimage to Sabari mala with stones and thorns on the path and reached the hill. For that devotee, who watched the brilliant lights of the Magara deepam and relished the Cupid-like handsome appearance of Aiyappa with his eyes, is there a need for any other luxuries in life? Author’s Note This song describes the charm of the Lord of Sabarimala, who was born as Manikantan in Kaliyuga. The song also describes the strenuous pilgrimage of devotees to see this divine figure. For more on Ayyappan story, including the history and origin of the devotees carrying specialized bag, see: For everything about irumudi, see: Irumudi significance For a typical pilgrimage trip, see the following link: Sabarimala Pilgrimage
